raw_transcript: Dietary changes are crucial. You need to eat six small meals a day instead of three big ones. Everything should be low-fat and low-fiber. Fiber is hard to digest and can clump together in a 'paralyzed' stomach, forming a blockage called a bezoar.
final_corrected_note: Dietary changes are crucial. You need to eat six small meals a day instead of three big ones. Everything should be low-fat and low-fiber. Fiber is hard to digest and can clump together in a 'paralyzed' stomach, forming a blockage called a bezoar.
